name: OFX Group Limited
description: OFX Group Limited is an Australian-based financial technology company that specializes in international payments and foreign exchange services. Formerly known as OzForex, the company provides secure money transfer solutions for individuals, businesses, online sellers, and enterprise clients across the Asia Pacific, North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. By leveraging its global platform, OFX enables customers to send and receive money internationally while avoiding traditional bank fees. The company is publicly listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) and continues to expand its digital financial services to facilitate seamless cross-border transactions.
